character.definition: mess; out of order, chaos; confusion, (of clothes) tattered; in rags
(same as 輊) the low rear of a chariot, etc.
picture, scroll; one of pair of
leave, depart; go away; separate; trigram ☲; hexagram ䷝
(tǎ) place name in Zhejiang; (dá) cobblestone, water gate, place name in Guangdong
